meta.title: Salafi Homeschool Comprehensive Curriculum
meta.description: Complete birth-to-Grade-1 homeschool curriculum covering secular academics, Islamic education, creative arts, physical development, and life skills. Designed for daily lesson planning across 365 days per year.

topicFormat.subject: string — parent subject slug
topicFormat.title: string — clear, actionable topic title
topicFormat.estimatedSessions: number — how many daily sessions this topic typically needs (1-5)
topicFormat.prerequisites: string[] — topic IDs that should come before this

strands.name: Arabic Letter Recognition
strands.description: Learning to identify and pronounce Arabic/Hijaiyah letters

strands.name: Quran Recitation (Tilawah)
strands.description: Reading and reciting Quranic text with proper pronunciation

strands.name: Quran Memorization (Hifz)
strands.description: Committing selected surahs and ayahs to memory

strands.name: Tajweed Basics
strands.description: Rules of Quranic recitation and pronunciation

strands.name: Quran Understanding
strands.description: Age-appropriate understanding of Quranic meanings and lessons

strands.name: Quran Stories & Lessons
strands.description: Stories from Quran and their moral lessons

strands.name: Aqeedah (Islamic Belief)
strands.description: Core beliefs: Tawheed, angels, books, prophets, Day of Judgment

strands.name: Seerah (Life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
strands.description: Stories and lessons from the Prophet's life

strands.name: Stories of the Prophets
strands.description: Lives and lessons of all prophets mentioned in Quran

strands.name: Fiqh (Worship & Practice)
strands.description: Practical worship: salah, fasting, zakat, hajj basics

strands.name: Adhkar & Duas
strands.description: Daily remembrances and supplications

strands.name: Islamic Manners & Character
strands.description: Islamic etiquette, honesty, kindness, respect

strands.name: Islamic History & Civilization
strands.description: Key events, companions, and Islamic heritage

strands.name: Arabic Alphabet & Writing
strands.description: Learning Arabic letters in all forms and writing them

strands.name: Arabic Vocabulary
strands.description: Everyday Arabic words and phrases

strands.name: Arabic Reading
strands.description: Reading simple Arabic words and sentences

strands.name: Arabic Writing & Composition
strands.description: Writing simple Arabic sentences and short compositions

strands.name: Phonemic Awareness
strands.description: Hearing, identifying, and manipulating sounds in words

strands.name: Letter Recognition & Formation
strands.description: Identifying uppercase and lowercase letters, writing them

strands.name: Phonics
strands.description: Sound-letter relationships, blending, and decoding

strands.name: Sight Words & Vocabulary
strands.description: High-frequency words, word walls, vocabulary building

strands.name: Reading & Comprehension
strands.description: Reading fluency, comprehension strategies, literary analysis

strands.name: Writing & Handwriting
strands.description: Letter formation, sentence writing, creative and structured writing

strands.name: Grammar & Usage
strands.description: Parts of speech, sentence structure, punctuation

strands.name: Literature & Poetry
strands.description: Exposure to stories, poems, genres, and literary elements

strands.name: Number Sense & Counting
strands.description: Counting, number recognition, place value, comparing numbers

strands.name: Operations & Algebraic Thinking
strands.description: Addition, subtraction, patterns, equations

strands.name: Geometry & Spatial Sense
strands.description: Shapes, spatial reasoning, symmetry, transformations

strands.name: Measurement & Data
strands.description: Length, weight, volume, time, graphing, data collection

strands.name: Patterns & Logic
strands.description: Recognizing, extending, and creating patterns; logical reasoning

strands.name: Money & Time
strands.description: Coin recognition, basic values, telling time, calendars

strands.name: Life Science (Biology)
strands.description: Plants, animals, human body, living things, habitats

strands.name: Physical Science
strands.description: Matter, forces, energy, magnetism, simple machines

strands.name: Earth Science
strands.description: Rocks, soil, water cycle, landforms, natural resources

strands.name: Space & Astronomy
strands.description: Sun, moon, stars, planets, day/night, seasons

strands.name: Weather & Climate
strands.description: Weather types, seasons, clouds, measurement, forecasting

strands.name: Environment & Nature
strands.description: Ecosystems, conservation, food chains, nature exploration

strands.name: Self & Family
strands.description: Identity, family roles, personal history, emotions

strands.name: Community & Helpers
strands.description: Community workers, places, rules, cooperation

strands.name: Culture & Diversity
strands.description: Cultural awareness, traditions, similarities and differences

strands.name: Geography & Maps
strands.description: Maps, globes, continents, countries, landmarks

strands.name: History Basics
strands.description: Past vs present, timelines, simple historical events

strands.name: Visual Arts (Drawing, Painting)
strands.description: Drawing techniques, color theory, painting, mixed media

strands.name: Music & Rhythm
strands.description: Singing, rhythm, instruments, music appreciation

strands.name: Crafts & Sculpture
strands.description: Paper crafts, clay, building, 3D art

strands.name: Dramatic Play & Performance
strands.description: Role play, puppet shows, storytelling performance

strands.name: Gross Motor Skills
strands.description: Running, jumping, climbing, balance, coordination

strands.name: Fine Motor Skills
strands.description: Pencil grip, cutting, threading, puzzles, manipulation

strands.name: Health & Nutrition
strands.description: Healthy food groups, hygiene, body care, exercise

strands.name: Sports & Games
strands.description: Team games, individual challenges, sport basics

strands.name: Self-Care & Hygiene
strands.description: Dressing, bathing, dental care, personal cleanliness

strands.name: Manners & Etiquette
strands.description: Polite language, sharing, taking turns, table manners

strands.name: Emotional Intelligence
strands.description: Identifying feelings, empathy, self-regulation, coping

strands.name: Safety Awareness
strands.description: Home safety, stranger awareness, road safety, emergency

strands.name: Independence & Responsibility
strands.description: Chores, organization, time management, decision-making
